# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Istio mesh configuration (meshConfig) that allows outbound traffic to any external service. Set outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY so services can call external APIs without ServiceEntry definitions. This provides maximum flexibility for microservices that integrate with various external APIs.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: istio-test
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  namespace: default # change to your namespace, you can also use 'global' for a global rule that applies across all namespaces in the cluster or pick specific resource as needed e.g., istiod-test (replace with actual name if it exists)  
  name: myDestinationRuleName1234567890 # replace this to your own value; should be unique per service/namespace combination
spec: {}   
---         
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:  
  namespace: default     # change here as above for same purpose in one of the following rules, else comment or uncomment according to requirement          
name: myGatewayName      # replace this with your name; should be unique per cluster/namespace combination       
spec:             
# Uncomment and add more Gateways if required  e.g.,         
   selectors:               
     - name: 'default'                 # match all services by default      
---    //end of first rule        
// Comment or un-Comment as per requirement            i.e, outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY          
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3         
kind: VirtualService   ##Virtual Service for Outbounds    e.g.,  myOutboundGatewayName    
metadata                      
 name:'out'                 # replace this with your value; should be unique per service          
 namespace : 'default'      # change here as above, similar to DestinationRules             
spec:  
 gateway: ''                # Uncomment and provide Gateways Name if required e.g., myOutboundGatewayName          //outbounds will still allow any traffic due allServices are set in the default namespace      
 subsets : [ {    } ]      # Add your subset configuration to handle outgoing services     same as DestinationRules        istioctl delete vs <name> -n <namespace>  --crd-full-name=virtualservice.networking.istio.io         
---  //end of second rule   (if any more rules are needed)    e.g., like below            #for third rule if required        apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3                kind: VirtualService                  metadata                   name:'third'                          namespace : 'default''spec:                    gateway: ''                       subsets:[{}]
